title: perezia lactucoides subsp. palustris
intro: Perezia lactucoides subsp. palustris, also known as marsh Perezia, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of marsh Perezia include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Marsh Perezia is traditionally used to prepare herbal infusions and decoctions, as well as being used in the production of essential oils and tinctures.
